rationale: Both papers center on context effects and the attraction effect, and the cited paper specifically reports that resource depletion strengthens attraction by shifting toward intuitive processing, which is conceptually close to the citing paper’s mechanism claims about reduced trade-off aversion and greater rule-based/heuristic processing.
